texto: And Goneville? It is a name that kept coming up as I was writing this book, and each time its meaning shifted a little. It's almost Gonville, the suburb of Whanganui where Johnny Devlin, New Zealand's first rock 'n'roll star, grew up, so arguably the birthplace of New Zealand rock 'n'roll. But it is also an imaginary place that might be every obscure New Zealand town that every obscure New Zealand band ever played.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nick Bollinger que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “And Goneville? It is a name that kept coming up as I was writing this book, and each time its mea…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, kiwi, memoir, com foco em memoir e music.
